query_intent: Summarize 30-day performance from 1998-08-05 across store, catalog, and web channels by combining sales, returns, and net profit at channel entity level with rollup subtotals.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate store sales and profit by store for the 30-day window.
Aggregate store return amount and net loss by store for the same window.
Aggregate catalog sales and profit by call center for the window.
Aggregate catalog returns and net loss by call center for the window.
Aggregate web sales and profit by web page for the window.
Aggregate web returns and net loss by web page for the window.
Combine channel aggregates, net profits against losses, and produce rollup totals by channel and channel-specific id.
